outreach.notes: Korea Trade-Investment Promotion Agency; its World Expo team tendered the Korean Pavilion Exhibition Service (KRW 9bn, bids closed 29 Apr 2026 — winner not public, WATCH). KOTRA also organizes Korean company participation — prime booth-list gatekeeper. No email published; tender ran via Nara Market. Source (A, verified): kia.or.kr notice 19682.
